product_results.title: NIKE Air MAX Correlate, Men's Running Shoes

summary.text: Customers find these shoes to be good quality and super comfortable. They appreciate the great look and great details of the appearance. However, some customers experience issues with staining. Opinions are mixed regarding the fit and durability of the shoes.

authors_reviews.title: Parfaite!
authors_reviews.text: Tout ce que l'on peut attendre d'une paire de Nike air! Juste parfaite, très belle, très confortable et durable.
authors_reviews.author: Ludo

authors_reviews.title: It’s Nike air
authors_reviews.text: Very comfortable but you know it’s Nike air ! You can’t go wrong e with this class of shoes ,i wear between 11.5 and 12 and and I got 12 and they fit just right:/
authors_reviews.author: Alex

authors_reviews.title: Possibly defective
authors_reviews.text: I love the shoes, unfortunately mine showed up in half a box (missing lid) and one of the shoes has a slight defect - not super noticeable but i think the seller gets discounted defective shoes and resells them at premium prices.
authors_reviews.author: rusty

authors_reviews.title: They are really nice
authors_reviews.text: They are so well made.Beautiful runner.
authors_reviews.author: Wendy
